call_risk: Moderate call risk — callable in ~2 years at $100.00. Monitor refinancing conditions as call date approaches.
target_investor: Conservative tax-exempt income investors with a 5+ year horizon looking for modest spread pickup over benchmark peers.
plain_english:
This $8.5M Albuquerque Water Utility Authority bond is modestly higher-yielding than its peers.

At 4.52% yield-to-worst, it sits 63 basis points above the 3.88% average for similar A2/A-rated revenue bonds in the 2031 maturity range.

CALL RISK: Moderate call risk — callable in ~2 years at $100.00. Monitor refinancing conditions as call date approaches.

WHO IT'S FOR: Conservative tax-exempt income investors with a 5+ year horizon looking for modest spread pickup over benchmark peers.

call_risk: HIGH call risk — issuer can redeem in ~6 months at $100.00. The YTW already reflects this worst-case scenario.
target_investor: Income-focused investors with a 8+ year horizon who are comfortable with small-issuer liquidity constraints and seeking above-market tax-exempt yield.
red_flag: Near-term call risk (2026-12-01) may erode the yield advantage if issuer refinances.
plain_english:
This $15.7M Louisiana Children's Medical Center bond is notably higher-yielding than its peers.

At 5.18% yield-to-worst, it sits 93 basis points above the 4.25% average for similar Baa1/BBB+-rated revenue bonds in the 2033 maturity range.

CALL RISK: HIGH call risk — issuer can redeem in ~6 months at $100.00. The YTW already reflects this worst-case scenario.

WHO IT'S FOR: Income-focused investors with a 8+ year horizon who are comfortable with small-issuer liquidity constraints and seeking above-market tax-exempt yield.

RED FLAG: Near-term call risk (2026-12-01) may erode the yield advantage if issuer refinances.
